name: Trisha's Italian Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
CAKE:
Cream margarine and shortening with sugar. Add egg yolks. Combine flour, soda, and salt, adding alternately with buttermilk. Add vanilla, coconut, and pecans. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites. Grease and flour three 8-inch cake pans. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
FROSTING:
Cream cheese and margarine. Add remaining ingredients. Double the ingredients if you prefer a thicker frosting.
